2605.01282.title: A Target-Free Harmonization Method for MRI
2605.01282.paper_summary: In MRI, variations in scan parameters, sequence, or hardware can lead to discrepancies in image appearance, even for the same subject. These inconsistencies, known as domain shifts, can hinder image analysis and degrade the performance of deep learning models trained on data from specific target domains. MRI image harmonization aims to address these issues by aligning source domain images to the target domain images while preserving biological information such as anatomical structures. However, most existing harmonization approaches require access to both source and target domain data in training or test time. This dependence induces data sharing between institutions, raising concerns about patient privacy and substantially limiting the harmonization approaches that can be practically deployed in clinical settings. To overcome these limitations, we introduce TgtFreeHarmony, the harmonization framework tailored for target-free scenarios, eliminating the need for target domain data and any data sharing, enabling privacy-preserving harmonization directly within the source institution. Our approach estimates the target domain style by searching the manifold of MRI domain style constructed via a disentanglement-based generator using Bayesian optimization guided by the performance of a downstream task model, which is trained on target domain data. We evaluated our method on the brain tissue segmentation task across multiple institutes and demonstrated that it effectively harmonizes source images into target images, leading to improved downstream task performance. By enabling harmonization without any access to target-domain data, TgtFreeHarmony establishes a new direction of harmonization preserving data privacy that can be realistically deployed within clinical environments.
2605.01282.paper_summary_zh: 在MRI中，掃描參數、序列或硬體的變化可能導致影像外觀的差異，即使對於同一受試者也是如此。這些不一致性被稱為領域轉移，可能會妨礙影像分析並降低在特定目標領域數據上訓練的深度學習模型的性能。MRI影像和諧化旨在通過將源領域影像對齊至目標領域影像，同時保留生物信息，如解剖結構，來解決這些問題。然而，大多數現有的和諧化方法在訓練或測試時都需要訪問源領域和目標領域的數據。這種依賴性引發了機構之間數據共享的問題，並引起了對患者隱私的擔憂，實質上限制了可以在臨床環境中實際部署的和諧化方法。為了克服這些限制，我們提出了TgtFreeHarmony，這是一個針對無目標情境量身定制的和諧化框架，消除了對目標領域數據和任何數據共享的需求，使得在源機構內部直接進行隱私保護的和諧化成為可能。我們的方法通過使用基於解耦的生成器構建的MRI領域風格流形，利用貝葉斯優化來估計目標領域風格，並根據在目標領域數據上訓練的下游任務模型的性能進行指導。我們在多個機構的腦組織分割任務上評估了我們的方法，並證明它能有效地將源影像和諧化為目標影像，從而提高下游任務的性能。通過實現無需訪問目標領域數據的和諧化，TgtFreeHarmony建立了一個新的方向，實現了數據隱私保護的和諧化，並且可以在臨床環境中現實地部署。
2605.01282.author: Minjun Kim et.al.
2605.01282.authors: Minjun Kim, Dong Ju Mun, Hwihun Jeong, Hangyeol Park, Haechang Lee, Se Young Chun, Jongho Lee
